_comment: Suppress-until registry for the executive-summary builder. When a digest alert is known-explained (settled memory, expected-until-window-rolls, etc.), add an entry here so it moves to the 'Suppressed (known)' section instead of retriggering triage cycles. Entry format: {tool, signal (optional — matches on verdict substring; null = any), suppress_until (YYYY-MM-DD, inclusive), reason, memory_ref}. See build_executive_summary.py::check_suppression.

suppressions.reason: Known 06-30 seasonal marine-layer weakening. anomaly detector's 21d baseline still contains pre-break data; alert will keep firing until baseline window rolls past 2026-06-30 (approx 2026-08-06). Not new signal.
